name: Attuned_Cupids_Crush_E
display_help: UNIQUE -- No more than 1 enhancement of this type may be slotted by a character.  Increases accuracy by {Boost.Attrib.Accuracy.Scale}%. Enhances damage by {Boost.Attrib.Damage.Scale}%. Reduces endurance cost by {Boost.Attrib.Endurance.Scale}%. Increases recharge rate by {Boost.Attrib.RechargeTime.Scale}%.
